svg.title: ZeroOps Live Data Flow — Sentinel and Guardian Scenarios
svg.desc: SVG diagram showing the two live demo data flows: Sentinel autonomous and Guardian HiTL, with timing annotations
svg.text: MTTR: ~52 sec · 0 human gates · Pillar 1 Sentinel
MTTR: ~3–4 min · 1 human gate (11s) · Pillar 2 Guardian
